inventory.title: Inventory Automation
inventory.description: Automatically update product inventory settings when group buy campaigns start or end.
inventory.enableLabel: Enable 'Continue selling when out of stock' on campaign creation
inventory.enableHelp: Ensures customers can join the group buy even if physical inventory is zero.
inventory.disableLabel: Disable 'Continue selling when out of stock' when campaign ends or is deleted
inventory.disableHelp: Reverts the product to its original inventory behavior once the campaign is inactive.
inventory.enableYesHelp: Ensures buyers can always join the group buy, even if your Shopify inventory hits zero.
inventory.enableNoLabel: No, I will manage it manually
inventory.disableYesHelp: Prevents accidental purchases after the group buy has officially closed.
inventory.disableNoLabel: No, I will manage it manually
inventory.pageDesc: Configure how the app handles your product inventory when a campaign starts and ends.

email.title: Email Notifications
email.description: Automatically send custom emails to customers when a group buy finishes. These replace Shopify's default cancellation emails to prevent duplication (only effects group buy orders).
email.failedToggle: Send 'Group Buy Failed' Email (Replaces Shopify Cancellation Email, only effects group buy orders)
email.customizeNote: Note: You can fully customize the email text, translate it into other languages, and add your store logo later in the main Settings page.
email.successYesHelp: Keeps buyers excited and informed that their order is being processed, significantly reducing support tickets.
email.failedYesHelp: Automatically notifies buyers so they aren't left wondering what happened to their order.
email.logoHelp: Go to Shopify Settings > Files to upload your logo image. Once uploaded, copy the file link and paste it here.
email.missingEmailDesc: We couldn't find a public 'Sender email' for your store. If customers reply to these automated emails, their messages might bounce. Please add a Sender Email in your
email.activeEmailDesc: When customers reply to these notifications, the emails will be routed directly to your support inbox:
email.pageDesc: Choose whether you want the app to automatically notify customers when a group buy reaches its goal or fails.

orderConfirm.title: Order Confirmation Setup
orderConfirm.description: Shopify requires this one-time manual step to prevent confusing 'Your order is shipping' emails from sending when customers join a Group Buy.
orderConfirm.boxDesc: Shopify does not allow apps to modify email templates automatically. Please follow these quick steps:
orderConfirm.step1: Click the button below to open your Shopify Notification Settings.
orderConfirm.step4_1: Press Ctrl + F (or Cmd + F) to search for this exact sentence:
orderConfirm.step4_code: We're getting your order ready to be shipped
orderConfirm.step5_1: Highlight that entire sentence and replace it with the code block below. Then click
orderConfirm.multiLangDesc: If you sell in multiple languages (e.g., Chinese) using the Translate & Adapt app:
orderConfirm.step6: In the Order Confirmation editor, click 'Localize' (or the language dropdown in the top right) to open the Translate & Adapt app.
orderConfirm.step7: Select your target language (e.g., Traditional Chinese) and find the 'Email body (HTML)' field.
orderConfirm.step8_code: 您的訂單已準備好配送
orderConfirm.step8_2: ) and replace it with the localized code block below, then Save.
orderConfirm.pageDesc: Because Group Buys only capture payments if they reach their goal, you can optionally update your Shopify Order Confirmation email template to explain this to customers so they don't get confused. If you prefer your standard emails, you can skip this step.

checkout.title: Checkout Protection
checkout.description: Prevent customers from mixing standard products with Group Buy items, or mixing items from different campaigns in a single order to ensure clean fulfillment.
checkout.activeDesc: Mixed carts (standard items or multiple campaigns) are strictly prohibited.
checkout.inactiveDesc: Customers can currently mix Group Buy items from any campaign with normal items.
checkout.pageDesc: Enable our native Shopify Functions to ensure buyers cannot bypass group buy rules or manipulate shipping options at checkout.

shipping.title: Shipping Strategy
shipping.description: Exclude Group Buy items from free shipping thresholds to protect your profit margins.
shipping.activeDesc: Group Buy items are excluded from free shipping.
shipping.inactiveDesc: Standard shipping rules apply to Group Buy items.

storefront.title: Storefront Display
storefront.description: Control how group buy campaigns appear to customers on your store.
storefront.badgeLabel: Show 'Group Buy' badge on product cards
storefront.badgeHelp: Automatically adds a visual badge to products with active campaigns on collection pages.
storefront.timerLabel: Show countdown timer below product title
storefront.timerHelp: Displays a live countdown timer on the product page.

future.title: Future Upgrades
future.description: Manage experimental features and future app enhancements.
future.text: New beta features and automation settings will appear here in future updates.

ShippingGuardian.errorNotFoundDesc: Could not detect the "Group Buy Shipping Guardian" on this store. Try running `npm run deploy` to push it to Shopify.
ShippingGuardian.activeDesc1: The Shipping Guardian is actively securing your checkouts.
ShippingGuardian.activeDesc2: To pause this rule, use the native "Turn off" button at the top of this Shopify page.
ShippingGuardian.inactiveDesc1: The Shipping Guardian is currently paused.
ShippingGuardian.inactiveDesc2: To resume protection, use the native "Turn on" button at the top of this Shopify page.
ShippingGuardian.cardDesc: When an Exclusive Group Buy Cart reaches the checkout, this function automatically strips away any Free Shipping thresholds to guarantee you collect standard shipping fees on the campaign.

deleteModal.title: Delete this campaign?
deleteModal.warning: This action can’t be undone. All campaign data will be permanently lost.
deleteModal.checkbox: I understand this action cannot be undone.

emptyState.heading: Manage your group buy campaigns
emptyState.description: Create your first campaign to start offering group buy discounts to your customers.

searchEmpty.title: No Items found
searchEmpty.description: Try changing the filters or search term

product.title: Product & Scope
product.description: Select the product and variants for this campaign.
product.scopeProductTooltip: The discount target applies to total sales across all variants combined.
product.scopeVariantTooltip: Each variant must reach the target individually to unlock the discount.

schedule.title: Schedule & Timezone
schedule.description: Set when your group buy starts and ends.

tiers.title: Discount Tiers
tiers.description: Define the volume discounts. Tiers must be in ascending order of quantity.
tiers.countBuyersTooltip: Progress increases by 1 for each unique customer's order and repeat customer in same campaign won't count, regardless of how many items they buy.
tiers.countItemsTooltip: Progress increases based on the actual quantity of items purchased.

features.title: Features
features.note: Note: Leader Discount and Fake Count cannot be used simultaneously. Enabling one will automatically turn off the other.
features.leaderDetails: First participants will receive a discount when they join a group buy.
features.leaderMaxQtyDetails: If the leader buys more than this amount, remaining items get the standard tier discount. Leave as 0 for no limit.
features.startingParticipantsDetails: Sets a starting number of participants to make the group buy look more popular.
features.startingItemsDetails: Sets a starting number of items sold to make the group buy look more popular.

notes.createLockWarning: Note: The product and campaign type will be locked after creation.
notes.editDate: You can adjust the campaign's end date at any time.
notes.editLockWarning: Tiers and features are locked once the campaign starts or participants join.
notes.editProductWarning: The selected product and campaign type cannot be changed.
notes.singleProductWarning: You can only select variants from a single product for each campaign.

errors.noVariants: Please select at least one variant.
errors.invalidDates: End date must be after start date.
errors.pastDates: Start date cannot be in the past.
errors.noTiers: Please add at least one discount tier.
errors.invalidTiers: Please fill out all tier fields correctly.
errors.tierOrder: Tiers must be in ascending order.

errors.noVariants: Please select at least one variant.
errors.invalidDates: End date must be after start date.
errors.pastDates: Start date cannot be in the past.
errors.noTiers: Please add at least one discount tier.
errors.invalidTiers: Please fill out all tier fields correctly.
errors.tierOrder: Tiers must be in ascending order.

messages.error: Please review the errors on the form

FulfillmentSummary.title: Fulfillment Summary
FulfillmentSummary.description: Total active items ordered that will need to be fulfilled.

empty.title: No orders found
empty.descBase: There are currently no orders for this campaign

Pricing.title: Subscription Plan
Pricing.description: Start your 30-day free trial today. Get full access to all features to supercharge your sales.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Learn how to set up campaigns, configure settings, and get the most out of our app.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Can't find what you're looking for? Our support team is here to help.

Onboarding.welcomeTitle: Why do we need this setup?
Onboarding.welcomeDesc: To ensure your customers have a flawless experience, Group Buy needs permission to automate your inventory, send automated emails, and protect your checkout from abuse.
Onboarding.step1ConfirmLabel: I confirm I have set my desired inventory rules.
Onboarding.step1HelpLocked: Please select an option for both inventory settings above to proceed.
Onboarding.step2ConfirmLabel: I have decided which automatic emails to enable.
Onboarding.step2HelpLocked: Please select an option for both email settings above to proceed.
Onboarding.step3ConfirmLabel: I confirm I have enabled the required Checkout and Shipping extensions.
Onboarding.step3HelpLocked: Please activate both extensions above to unlock this checkbox.
Onboarding.step3HelpUnlocked: Both extensions are active! You may proceed.
Onboarding.optionalBadge: Optional, but recommended for best experience.
